text: ya'aqov 'eved elohim vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamasicha shoel lishelom sheneym 'asar hashevatim shebagola
akh lesimecha chishevu lakhem echay kaasher tavou beniseyonot shonim
mipeney sheyode'im atem ki-vochan emunatekhem mevi lidey savelanut
vehasavelanut shelema tiheye befa'olah lema'an tiheyu shelemim utemimim velo tacheseru kal-davar
veish mikem ki yechesar chakhema yevaqeshena meelohim hanoten lakol binediva uvelo honaat devarim vetinaten lo
uvilevad sheyevaqesh beemuna uviveli safeq ki-va'al safeq dome legal hayam nisa umetoraf barucha
vehaish hahu al-yedame venafesho ki-yisa davar meet yeho
ish asher chalaq libo hafakhepakh hu bekhal-derakhayv
aval haach hashafel yitehalel beromamuto
vehe'ashir yitehalel beshifeluto ki ya'avor ketsits hechatsir
ki zarach hashemesh bechamato vayeyabesh et-hechatsir vayibol tsitso vechen mareehu avad ken yibol he'ashir bahalikhotayv
asherey haish ha'omed beniseyono ki kaasher nivechan yisa 'ateret hachayim asher-hiveticha yeho leohavayv
al-yomar hamenuse haelohim nisani ki haelohim eynenu menuse bara' vehu lo-yenase ish
ki im-yenuse khal-ish betaavat nafesho asher tesitehu utefatehu
veacharey-khen hareta hataava vateled chete vehachete ki nigemar yolid et-hamavet
al-tite'u achay ahuvay
kal-matat tova vekhal-matana shelema tered mima'al meet avi haorot asher chiluf vekhal-tsel shinuy eyn-'imo
hu vechefetso yalad otanu bidevar haemet liheyot kemo reshit bikurey yetsurayv
'al-ken achay ahuvay yehi khal-ish mahir lishemo'a qashe ledaber veqashe likhe'os
ki-kha'as adam lo yife'al tsideqat elohim
lakhen hasiru me'aleykhem kal-tinuf vetarebut ra'a veqabelu va'anava et-hadavar hanatu'a bakhem asher yakhol lehoshi'a et-nafeshoteykhem
viheyu 'osey hadavar velo shome'ayv bilevad leramot et-nafeshekhem
ki haish hashome'a et-hadavar veeyn 'osehu dome leish mabit et-toar havayato bemarea
ki hibit el-mareehu vayelekh lo uverega' shakhach mah-taoro
aval hamasheqif batora hashelema torat hacherut umachaziq bah asher eynenu shome'a veshakhecha ki im-'ose befo'al asherey haish hahu bema'asehu
ish mikem im-yedame liheyot 'oved elohim veeynenu sam resen lileshono ki im-mate'e hu et-levavo 'avodato akhe-lariq tiheye
zot hi ha'avoda hatehora vehabara lifeney haelohim avinu lifeqod et-hayetomim vehaalemanot betsaratam velishemor nafesho beniqayon mecheleat ha'olam
achay al-yehi mas fanim beemunatekhem beyeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu adon hakavod
ki im-yavo ish leveyt hakeneset shelakhem vetabe'ot zahav 'al-yadayv vehu lavush levushey mikhelol uva shama gam-ish 'ani bivegadim tsoim
ufenitem el-halavush levushey mikhelol vaamaretem lo shev-lekha hena bekhavod vele'ani tomeru 'amad-sham o shev-po mitachat lahadom ragelay
halo lev valev lakhem vehinekhem shofetim ba'aley machashavot ra'ot
shime'u achay ahuvay halo va'aniyey ha'olam haze bachar haelohim liheyot 'ashirim baemuna veyoreshey hamalekhut asher hiveticha leohavayv
veatem hikhelametem et-he'ani halo ha'ashirim hem ha'osheqim etekhem vehem hasochavim etekhem el-batey din
halo hem hamegadefim et-hashem hatov haniqera 'aleykhem
hen ba'asotekhem et-hamitseva hamolekhet 'al-kulan kefi hakatuv veahaveta lere'akha kamokha teytivu la'asot
ulam im-tiseu fanim chataim atem vehatora tokhichakhem ke'overim 'aleyha
ki ish asher yeqayem et-kal-hatora venikheshal beachat mimitseoteyha nidon 'al-kulan
ki haomer lo tineaf hu haomer lo tiretsach veim-eynekha noef veata rotsecha hinekha 'over 'al-hatora
ken daberu vekhen 'aso kemi she'atidim lehishafet 'al-pi torat hacherut
ki eyn chesed bamishepat laasher lo-'asa chased vehachesed yitegae 'al-hamishepat
achay mah-yo'il leish sheyomar ki emuna vo uma'asim eyn bo hatukhal haemuna lehoshi'o
ach o achot ki-yiheyu ve'eyrom veeyn lahem lechem chuqam
veish mikem yomar aleyhem lekhu leshalom vehitechamamu useva'u velo-titenu lahem tsarekhey gufam mah-to'il zot
kakha gam-haemuna im-eyn bah ma'asim meta hi be'atsemah
veim-yomar ish ata emuna vekha veli ma'asim hareeni na et-emunatekha biveli ma'asim veareakha ani mitokh ma'asay et-emunati
ata maamin shehaelohim echad hu hetivota lehaamin gam hashedim maaminim bo vero'adim
veata ish-ba'ar hatachepots lada'at ki haemuna beeyn ma'asim meta hi
averaham avinu halo bema'asayv nitsedaq beha'aloto et-yitsechaq beno 'al-hamizebecha
hinekha roe ki-haemuna 'ozeret lema'asayv umitokh hama'asim hashelema haemuna
vayimale hakatuv haomer veheemin averaham bayho vatechashev-lo litsedaqa vayiqare ohev yeho
hinekhem roim ki bema'asim yitsedaq haish velo veemuna levadah
vekhen gam-rachav hazona halo nitsedeqa bema'asim beasefah et-hamaleakhim el-beytah vateshalechem bederekh acher
ki kaasher haguf mibeli neshama met hu ken gam-haemuna mibeli-ma'asim meta
achay al-yiheyu rabim mikem lemorim baasher yeda'etem ki vazot nachemir 'aleynu et-hadin
ki khulanu nikheshalim harebe vaasher lo-yikashel bedibur hu ish tamim veyakhol lasom resen lekhal-gufo
hine befi hasusim nasim et-haresen lema'an asher yishame'u lanu venihagenu vo et kal-geviyatam
vehine haoniot af-ki gedolot hena venehedafot berucha 'aza mashot qaton yinehag otan el-kol asher-yachepots hachovel ken gam-halashon evar qaton hi ugedolot tedaber
hine mah-gadol haya'ar veesh qetana tave'irenu gam-halashon esh hi 'olam male 'avela
ken halashon nitsevet beyn evareynu hamageelet et-kal-haguf umelahetet et-galegal havayatenu vehi lehuta beesh geyhinom
ki kal-min behema ve'of veremes vechayot hayam yikavesh venikhebashim hem 'al-yedey min haadam
aval halashon eyn adam yakhol lekhaveshah eyn ma'etsor lara'a hazot umelea chamat hamavet
bah nevarekh et-haelohim avinu uvah neqalel et-haanashim ha'asoyim betselem elohim
mipe echad yotset berakha uqelala vekhen lo-ye'ase echay
hayabi'a hama'eyan metuqim umarim mimotsa echad
achay hayukhal 'ets hateena la'asot zeytim o hatukhal hagefen la'asot teenim ken gam-ma'eyan echad lo yukhal linebo'a mayim meluchim umetuqim
mi vakhem chakham venavon yaree bedareko hatova et-ma'asayv be'anevat hachakhema
veim-qinea mara umeriva bilevavekhem al-titehalalu veal-teshaqeru baemet
lo zot hachakhema hayoredet mima'al ki im-chakhemat hacheled vehayetser vehashedim
ki-vimeqom qinea umeriva sham mehuma vekhal-ma'ase ra'
aval hachakhema asher mima'al tehora hi af-ohevet shalom umakhera'at lekhaf-zekhut velo 'omedet 'al-da'etah umelea rachamim uferi tov belo-lev valev veeyn chanupa bah
uferi hatsedaqa beshalom yizare'a le'osey hashalom
hamilechamot vehamedanim asher beyneykhem meayin hema halo mitokh hataaot hamitegarot beevareykhem
atem miteavim veeyn lakhem teratsechu uteqaneu vehaseg lo tasigu tarivu vetilachamu veeyn lakhem mipeney shel-sheeletem
hen shoalim atem velo yinaten lakhem 'al-asher sheeletem bera'a lema'an tevalu betaaoteykhem
hanoafim v hanoafot halo yeda'etem ki-ahavat ha'olam eyvat elohim hi ve'ata hechafets liheyot ohev ha'olam yiheye oyev lelohim
hatedamu venafeshekhem ki lariq amar hakatuv beqinea yiteave larucha asher hishekin beqirebenu
vegam yagedil latet-chen 'al-ken hakatuv omer elohim laletsim yalits vela'anavim yiten-chen
lakhen hikane'u lifeney haelohim hiteyatsevu neged hasatan veyiverach mipeneykhem
qirevu lelohim veyiqerav aleykhem rachatsu yedeykhem hachataim taharu levavekhem chaluqey halevav
hite'anu vehiteabelu uvekhu sechoqekhem yehafekh leevel vesimechatekhem leyagon
hishafelu lifeney yeho vehu yarim etekhem
achay al-tedaberu ish bere'ehu hamecharef et-re'ehu vedan et-achiv et-hatora hu mecharef veet-hatora hu dan veim-tadin et-hatora eynekha meqayem hatora ki im-danah
echad hu hamechoqeq vehashofet asher yakhol lehoshi'a uleabed umi ata ki tadin et-'amitekha
hoy haomerim nelekha hayom umachar le'ir pelonit alemonit vena'aseh-sham shana achat lisechor bah uleharebot hon
velo tede'u mah-yeled yom machar ki me chayeykhem 'ashan haniree kime'at-rega' veachar kala vayelakh
tachat asher tomeru im-yiretse yeho venicheye na'ase kazo vekhaze
'ata titehalalu vegaavatekhem vekhal-tehila khazot ra'a hi
lakhen hayode'a la'asot hatov velo ya'asenu chete hu lo
hoy ha'ashirim bekhu veheylilu 'al-hatsarot asher tavona 'aleykhem
'asherekhem bala uvigedeykhem akhalam 'ash
zehavekhem vekhasepekhem kisatam chelea vehayeta cheleatam bakhem le'edut veakhela kemo-esh et-besarekhem ze hu haotsar atsaretem lakhem leqets hayamim
hine sekhar hapo'alim osefey qetsir sedoteykhem asher 'ashaqetem tso'eq 'aleykhem vetsa'aqat haqotserim baa veazeney yeho tsevaot
hite'adanetem baarets vehite'anagetem vehishemanetem et-libekhem kemo leyom tivecha
hiresha'etem vahamitem et-hatsadiq vehu na'ane lo-yifetach piv
lakhen achay domu vehochilu 'ad-bo haadon hine haikar mechake letuv tevuat haadama umeyachel ki-yered 'aleyha geshem yore umaleqosh
ken hochilu gam-atem veametsu levavekhem ki qarov haadon lavo
echay al-titeonanu ish 'al-re'ehu pen-tishafetu hine hadayan 'omed bapatach
echay haneviim asher diberu beshem yeho hem yiheyu lakhem lemofet ha'oni vehatochelet
hine measherim anachenu et-hasovelim shema'etem savelanut iov veet-acharit haadon reitem ki-rachum vechanun yeho
verosh davar achay lo tishave'u lo vashamayim velo vaarets velo kal-shevu'a acheret vihi hen shelakhem hen velo shelakhem lo pen-tipelu bidey hadin
ish mikem ki-yetsar lo yitepalel vaasher yitav libo hu yezamer
ish mikem ki-yechele yiqera et-ziqeney haqehila veyitepalalu va'ado visukhuhu shemen beshem yeho
utefilat haemuna toshi'a et-hachole vayeho yeqimenu vaasher chata yisalach lo
hitevadu 'aonoteykhem ish lifeney re'ehu vehitepalalu ish be'ad re'ehu lema'an terafeu ki-gadol kocha tefilat hatsadiq haqore el-elohim bechazeqa
eliyahu enosh anush haya khamonu vehitepalel tefila shel yiheye matar velo-haya matar baarets shalosh shanim veshisha chodashim
vayashav vayitepalel vehashamayim natenu matar vehaarets hitsemicha et-pireyah
echay ki yite'e ish bakhem min-haemet veish acher yeshivenu
yeda'-na ki hameshiv et-hachote me'iqeshut dareko hu yoshi'a et-nafesho mimavet vikhase 'al-hamon pesha'im ﻿
